hero.title: Sea, spas and la dolce vita
hero.lead: Your B&B in Ischia Porto: thoughtfully designed rooms, breakfast with local flavours and direct booking, steps from the sea and ferries to the Gulf of Naples.
hero.errAdults: Please enter at least one adult.
hero.errDateRange: Invalid dates: check-out after arrival, not in the past, at least {{min}} nights.
hero.errCapacity: For {{room}} the maximum number of guests is {{max}}.

about.title: Our story
about.lead: We are in Ischia Porto, steps from the sea and mainland links: a family-run B&B where warm hospitality, breakfasts with local produce and tips on spas, beaches and villages make the difference. Every stay is designed to let you enjoy the island at an easy pace, between nature and tradition.
about.strength1: Family hospitality and a cared-for setting from spring through autumn.
about.strength2: Ideal for exploring Ischia: harbour, beaches, Aragonese Castle and trails.
about.strength3: Breakfast with pastries, fruit and flavours from the Gulf of Naples.
about.strength4: Suggestions for thermal baths, boat trips and sunny days.
about.imageAlt: The B&B in Ischia: terrace and Mediterranean view on a clear day.

services.title: Our services
services.intro: Everything you need for a carefree stay, with the attention to detail that defines us.
services.breakfastDesc: Every morning a sweet and savoury buffet with local products, homemade cakes and hot drinks.
services.wifiDesc: Fast connection throughout the property to work or share your stay in comfort.
services.parkingDesc: Reserved spaces or partner parking nearby, with clear directions at check-in.
services.acDesc: In-room climate control for maximum comfort in every season.
services.cleaningDesc: Daily housekeeping with fresh linen and courtesy amenities.
services.shuttleDesc: Bookable transfers to and from airport and station — ask reception for availability.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.intro: The atmosphere of our B&B in Ischia: spaces, breakfast and details — click to open the lightbox.

items.brightRoom: Bright room with double bed and light-coloured linens
items.breakfastTable: Breakfast table with local products and coffee
items.garden: Garden and outdoor areas of the property
items.lounge: Common lounge with sofas and natural light
items.greenView: Room with a view of greenery and light curtains
items.linens: Detail of linens and fresh flowers in the room

reviews.title: What our guests say
reviews.intro: Guests who stayed at our B&B in Ischia share their experience.
reviews.r1: Perfect stay in Ischia Porto: quiet room, breakfast with homemade limoncello and useful beach tips. We will return in spring.
reviews.r2: Spotless deluxe room, small balcony with a view over green rooftops. After Ischia’s spas, resting there was perfect.
reviews.r3: Handy for the ferry and walks towards the harbour. Welcoming atmosphere; only wish we could have stayed one more night!
reviews.r4: Great base to explore the island: Aragonese Castle, Sant’Angelo and beaches reachable by bus. Very comfortable bed.
reviews.r5: Ideal for a couple: dinner at a fish restaurant recommended by the property and a walk back. Kind, discreet staff.

roomsPreview.title: Our rooms
roomsPreview.lead: Choose from our options: each room is designed for maximum comfort during your stay.

location.title: Where we are
location.intro: In Ischia Porto, near the sea and links to the mainland.
location.mapAria: Interactive map with the bed and breakfast location
location.checkIn: Check-in: 3:00 pm – 8:00 pm (other times by arrangement)

standard.name: Standard room
standard.description: Cosy room in central Ischia Porto, ideal after a day at the sea or spas. Light furnishings, private shower bathroom and air conditioning for summer nights.
standard.shortDescription: Comfort for two guests, private bathroom, near the harbour.

deluxe.name: Deluxe room
deluxe.description: Spacious room with a small balcony over rooftops and green hills. Queen bed, minibar and tea set: perfect for breakfast in the room before visiting Aragonese Castle.

suite.name: Junior suite
suite.description: Open-plan suite with separate day area and single sofa bed: ideal for families with one child or anyone wanting more space after Citara or Maronti.
suite.shortDescription: Open space for up to 3 guests, living zone.

family.name: Family room
family.description: Two connecting spaces with double and single beds, designed for four exploring the island. Large bathroom with tub, handy after a day on a boat along the coast.
family.shortDescription: Up to 4 guests, two areas, bathroom with tub.

footer.tagline: Hospitality in Ischia, between sea and spas: curated rooms, island breakfast and tips for beaches and villages.

blog.title: Blog
blog.body: We are preparing guides on itineraries, local events and practical stay tips.

legal.lead: Below you’ll find information related to the processing of personal data and the use of cookies on this website.

privacy.section1Text: The controller of personal data is B&B Ischia (the “Controller”). The Controller’s contact details are provided in the Contact section of the website.
privacy.liNavigationData: Navigation data: IP address or other identifiers, browser type, pages visited, date and time of access, and technical information required for the website to function.
privacy.liUserProvidedData: User-provided data: information entered via contact forms or booking requests (e.g. name, contact details, stay dates, specific requests).
privacy.liCookieRelatedData: Data related to cookies: possibly collected through technical cookies and (where permitted) analytics or profiling cookies, as described in the Cookie Policy.
privacy.liPurpose1: Managing requests and booking enquiries submitted through the website, including processing communications with the user.
privacy.liPurpose2: Improving the website and the features offered, including anonymous or aggregated analyses (only if enabled through cookie preferences).
privacy.liPurpose3: Compliance with legal obligations, protecting the Controller’s rights, and managing any disputes.
privacy.liLegalBasis1: Performance of pre-contractual or contractual measures (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)) for managing bookings and requests.
privacy.liLegalBasis2: Legitimate interests (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)) for technical purposes and service improvement, within the applicable limits.
privacy.liLegalBasis3: Consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)) for non-essential cookies and related activities, where required.
privacy.section5Text: For information about the cookies used (purposes, types, duration and management), please refer to the Cookie Policy.
privacy.liRecipients1: Hosting and website maintenance providers (processors or authorized parties, where applicable).
privacy.liRecipients2: Analytics or statistics service providers (only if active according to the user’s cookie preferences).
privacy.liRecipients3: Communication service providers (e.g. email) and tools necessary to manage requests.
privacy.liRecipients4: Competent authorities, when required by applicable law.
privacy.section7Text: Data are kept for the time necessary to achieve the purposes described and, in any event, in accordance with legal obligations. Cookies are subject to the retention periods stated in the Cookie Policy.
privacy.section8Text: Any transfers to non-EU countries take place only in compliance with applicable law, for example where there is an adequacy decision or appropriate safeguards in place.
privacy.liRights1: Access to personal data and information relating to the processing.
privacy.liRights3: Erasure in the cases provided by applicable law.
privacy.liRights4: Objection to processing for reasons related to your particular situation.
privacy.liRights6: Data portability within the limits provided.
privacy.liRights7: Lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (in Italy, the Garante per la protezione dei dati personali).
privacy.section10Text: To exercise your rights, you may contact the Controller using the details provided in the Contact section. The Controller will respond within the timeframes required by applicable law.
privacy.note: Note: this text is an informational draft. We recommend having it reviewed and adapted by a qualified professional to ensure regulatory compliance.

cookie.section1Text: Cookies are small text files or similar technologies stored on the user’s device when visiting the website. They are used to enable certain features and, in some cases, to collect information about how the website is used.
cookie.liTypes1: Technical cookies (or “necessary”): essential for the website to function and to provide the requested services.
cookie.liTypes2: Analytics cookies: may be used to measure website usage and improve content and performance.
cookie.liTypes3: Marketing cookies (profiling): used to display more relevant content or ads based on the user’s preferences and activities.
cookie.section3Text: The website may include third-party cookies provided via external services (e.g. for statistics or content). The activation of these cookies, where requested, takes place only after your choice through the cookie banner or equivalent settings.
cookie.section4Text: You can modify your preferences at any time using the options available in the cookie banner. Alternatively, you can also adjust them via your browser settings, following the browser provider’s instructions.
cookie.liControl2: Withdraw consent at any time by changing your preferences.
cookie.liControl3: Block or delete cookies in your browser (with possible limitations to website functionality).
cookie.section5Text: The processing of non-essential cookies is based on the user’s consent when required by applicable law. Necessary technical cookies may be handled without consent, within the provided limits.
cookie.section6Text: Cookie durations vary depending on the type and provider. Some cookies are “session” cookies (removed when you close your browser), while others remain stored for a defined period.
cookie.section7Text: This Cookie Policy may be updated to reflect technical, organisational or legal changes. The version published on the website is the most recent.
cookie.section8Text: For questions about cookies or your preferences, you can contact the Controller using the details listed on the website.
cookie.note: Note: this text is an informational draft. We recommend adapting it with the actual list of cookies and having it reviewed by a qualified professional to ensure compliance.

cookieBanner.title: Cookies
cookieBanner.text: We use technical cookies necessary for the website’s operation and, only with your choice, cookies to analyze usage and improve the experience. More details in:
cookieBanner.note: Your preferences can be changed at any time.

seo.homeDesc: Book your stay in Ischia: B&B near the sea, breakfast included, spas and beaches within easy reach.
seo.bookDesc: Direct booking: choose dates and room.
seo.roomsDesc: Discover our rooms and suites with transparent prices and direct booking.
seo.successDesc: Thank you — we have registered your request.

mockReviews.m1: Perfect location in Ischia Porto, breakfast with homemade cakes and hosts full of beach tips. We will return in spring!
mockReviews.m2: Spotless deluxe room, quiet despite being near the centre. The balcony with an island view in the evening was a plus.
mockReviews.m3: Lovely B&B on Ischia, authentic breakfast with local lemons. Short walk to the ferry — stairs a bit steep, typical of the island.
mockReviews.m4: Junior suite ideal with our daughter after days at Maronti and Sant’Angelo. Spacious and well organised.
mockReviews.m5: Great value for money, partner parking a few minutes away. Friendly staff, helpful with ferries.
mockReviews.m6: Family room perfect with two children: handy for getting around the island by bus. Comfortable beds after sun and sea.
